entry.title: Remember That Night?
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,719Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Evan Buckley met Rue Bennett at fourteen.They became best friends. Buck has been sober for six years.Now during the lawsuit, Buck relapses. 😭🥹💔💊 [You don't need to watch Euphoria to read this, based in the 911 universe, will have enough context about Rue to understand.]

entry.title: My name is yours to keep
entry.summary:
Author: Elgcarres

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,739Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 166

Summary: ... He doesn't want to hear his name ever again. He might change it. Eddie ruined his name because only Eddie could use his name properly.And he still uses it… properly.***It started as a fix-it story for 'Lab Rats'. It doesn't go well *** What if there's Eddie in the lab What if it's him who dies instead of Bobby. Kinda.

entry.title: Cowboy Hat Rules
entry.summary:
Author: sassay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,350Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: "You need a proper Stetson," Eddie takes his own off and places it on Buck's head, adjusting it slightly and stepping back minutely to admire his handiwork, "There. The colour suits you." Buck's staring at him, jaw dropped, "Eddie…I may not have grown up in El Paso or Nashville but I did work on a ranch and I know what hat rules are…" Eddie smirks, "That's good then, so I don't need to explain to you what this means, do I?" "I mean…I didn't think so but now I'm not so sure," Buck furrows his brow in thought, maybe it means something different? Eddie leans in to whisper, "It means exactly what you think it means." Buck and Eddie's last night in Nashville ends a little differently when Buck turns down Dixie in favour of returning to the hotel room with Eddie. Eddie decides to take a chance and claim Buck for himself - it works out well for both of them. Coda/Fix-it Fic

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: one single glimpse of relief
entry.summary:
Author: greyspilot

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,560Chapters: 15/20Kudos: 191

Summary: "What if I never get better? What if I always feel like this?" Buck finally looks back up at him, vulnerability and compassion clear on his too-expressive face. "I don't know," he says honestly. "I don't…" he shudders, gives a tiny shrug of his shoulders and tries again. "I don't have an answer for that, man. It's been seven months for me and I still feel…like this." "Like what?" Buck just shrugs again, then mumbles, "Not myself." And Eddie doesn't know what to say to that either, because this is the only version of Buck he's ever known.Or: Buck and Eddie meet at grief group.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Step by step
entry.summary:
Author: Vasylisk_Lissa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,863Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Minutes, hours, days, weeks… might as well be years…He doesn’t know how long he’s been here. Hell, he doesn’t know where exactly he is. Soon he’ll forget his name, but he’ll never forget his.Chris.He needs to survive to come back to him. Chris needs him. He can’t end up as one more name on the list of people that boy has lost. Buck gets kidnapped and goes through hell.

entry.title: In The Aftermath
entry.summary:
Author: crowswriting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,370Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: After his rescue, Eddie isnt going to leave Buck's side. Not until he's awake. Not until he's home. Not until Eddie can tell Buck he loves him.   ____________________________________ A post-kidnapping arc fic where in the time he was looking for Buck, Eddie realized that he loves Buck. Now that Buck's in recovery, Eddie has to confront these feelings.

entry.title: Better The Devil You Know, Than The Devil You Don't...
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,801Chapters: 23/50Kudos: 898

Summary: Lucifer made a deal with the Buckley's, he will save Daniel and they take in and love his son Evan as their own. When the Buckley parents don't follow through with their side of the deal, Lucifer brings Evan with him to LA. This is the story of Evan Buckley the Son of the Devil, The Prince of Hell. Note:First 2 Chapters go through his life before the 118.Chapter 3 he is with the 118.Chapter 4 is when Eddie arrives. [You don't really need to watch Lucifer, but it would be helpful, but enough context will be supplied.] This is mostly in 911 universe, with comments and references from the Lucifer universe. 🫣🤭 😈 🔪 🚒 🚔 🪽

entry.title: The Family We Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,453Chapters: 14/18Kudos: 301

Summary: Evan Buckley was truly fucked. One week after leaving the only home he’d ever known—his parents’ house—Ground Zero hit, and the world went to hell. Eight months later, he’s still searching for his sister Maddie in Los Angeles, armed only with a tear-stained note: “I’m leaving Doug. I’m going to Los Angeles.” When Buck finally tracks her to Safe Zone 118, he realizes that maybe having a family—and surviving alongside people who actually care—isn’t so bad. At 118, firefighter Eddie Diaz, a single dad, turned his fire station into a refuge with his team when Ground Zero struck. Just trying to keep his kids safe, he’s thrown for a loop when a stranger shows up claiming to be Maddie’s brother. Buck is skilled, prepared, and oddly magnetic—forcing Eddie to question everything he thought he knew about survival, trust, and maybe even… something more.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: 4 Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: Orchid_217

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,133Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 141

Summary: Buck has a secret. Well four big secrets. He never meant for them to be secrets but when he joined the 118 they assumed some things and he just didn’t correct them. They assumed that he was an irresponsible, frat guy who slept with half the population of L.A which might’ve been who he was if he never met Eddie. Or Buck has a husband and 3 kids at home and the team finds out.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 123,850Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 85

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: I Miss You, I'm Sorry
entry.summary:
Author: itsbuckleybaby

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,307Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 95

Summary: Buck overhears a conversation he was never supposed to hear.   Suddenly he feels like there is no room for him in Chris and Eddie's life.   Only problem-- Chris and Eddie aren't ready to let him go.

entry.title: The long way home
entry.summary:
Author: M00NR1NG

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,972Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 24

Summary: After the Firefighter Games in Nashville, a canceled flight leaves Evan Buckley and Eddie Diaz with only one option if they want to make it back to Los Angeles in time for Henrietta Wilson’s birthday: a cross-country road trip. But somewhere along the empty highways between Tennessee and California, another driver begins following them. What starts as a simple drive home ends in a crash on a lonely road—and when Eddie wakes up in the hospital, Buck is gone. Taken by a man who believes he’s on a mission from God.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

  • So basically Abigail’s dad wants revenge on Eddie for taking his daughter away so he takes buck away from him in return

entry.title: i made a fist and not a plan
entry.summary:
Author: fathersalmon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,750Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 48

Summary: Mafia boss Eddie Diaz has found himself in a debt mountain he can’t climb. Betrayed by his closest advisors, he’s unsure if his ‘company’ can stay afloat. The solution to his problems turns into the form of Evan ‘Buck’ Buckley, former child math prodigy turned fitness instructor recluse living with his sister Maddie. When one of Eddie’s employees turns up dead, it’s Buck who takes responsibility for it, and ends up being the replacement as a result. Quick to learn, Buck finds out about Eddie’s predicament and offers to help, resulting in the rival boss, Mitchell Trent, to resort to unsavoury measures in an effort to keep controlling Eddie’s debt. Fueled by the tension between them and the ever-growing stakes of their lives, Buck and Eddie find themselves in a growing game of twists and turns as they reconcile Eddie’s debt and keep Mitchell Trent off their asses, only to fall in love in the process.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
